after_action_reviews.what_was_planned: Continue autonomous paper trading with 30-ticker scanner
after_action_reviews.what_happened: Discovered critical $100 fallback price bug in asymmetry scanner. All tickers not in market_data.json default to $100, generating false positive scores (100-280% upside calculations).
after_action_reviews.variance_analysis: Complete breakdown of scanner reliability. AAPL showing 144.7 score based on $100→$380 target (actual $327→$380 = 16% upside, score ~2.1). All non-cached tickers affected.
after_action_reviews.root_cause: getEstimatedPrice() returns $100 for unknown tickers. market_data.json only contains 4 assets. Scanner expects 30.
lessons: Price sanity validation must be mandatory before scoring
Fallback defaults must fail safe (null/skip), not optimistic ($100)
Single source of truth for prices prevents drift
Scanner validation suite needed: price range checks, score sanity bounds
concrete_changes: Identified fix: expand market_data.json to all 30 tickers OR change fallback to null
Added PRICE_SANITY config range for validation
after_action_reviews.impact_verification: No new trades since bug discovery. Portfolio preserved at $50K cash.

after_action_reviews.what_was_planned: Publish 10 designs to Printify → Etsy after 10-day API blocker
after_action_reviews.what_happened: Successfully published 10 products Jul 22 10:54 CET. Printify Product IDs validated. Etsy sales channel sync in progress.
after_action_reviews.variance_analysis: Clean execution after resolving SVG→PNG conversion blocker.
lessons: Image format requirements are non-obvious blockers (SVG rejected)
Printify API token scope issues require manual re-authentication
Etsy sync takes 24-48 hours — patience required post-publication
after_action_reviews.impact_verification: Products visible in Printify dashboard with Product IDs. Awaiting Etsy sync completion.

improvements_made.description: Critical $100 fallback price bug discovered in asymmetry scanner
improvements_made.action_taken: Documented bug, disabled scanner pending fix, preserved portfolio capital
improvements_made.impact: No false trades executed. Safety systems working.

improvements_made.impact: Revenue stream now in validation phase

improvements_made.description: AAR logged for scanner bug and POD launch
improvements_made.action_taken: Captured lessons on price validation and image format blockers

lessons: Price sanity checks are non-negotiable — any scoring system must validate inputs
Optimistic fallbacks ($100) are dangerous; pessimistic fallbacks (null/skip) are safer
Bug discovery before trades = success, not failure. Safety systems working as designed.
Etsy sync latency (24-48h) is normal — don't panic on Day 1
Twelve Data free tier (8/min) insufficient for 12-asset hourly refresh — need staggered delays
Cached data fallback is valuable — 3-hour-old prices are still actionable
Single source of truth prevents this class of bug entirely
backlog_changes: + FIX CRITICAL: Expand market_data.json to all 30 scanner tickers OR change fallback to null
+ ADD: PRICE_SANITY validation gates in scanner before scoring
+ ADD: Score sanity bounds (scores >20 should trigger validation failure)
+ ADD: Staggered API requests (8s+ delays) to avoid Twelve Data rate limits
~ POD: Monitor first sales window (24-48h from Jul 22 10:54)
